name: com.multinex/memq
title: Multinex MemQ
description: Sovereign persistent memory for AI agents. Durable recall, replay, reflection, and benchmark-backed continuity. Supports billing OAuth for authenticated users and bearer API keys for static clients.

_meta.benchmark_scope: Artifact-backed deterministic fixture benchmark: Mnemosyne conditions passed 3/3 while stateless and naive-memory controls passed 0/3.
